overlay_intro: The panel overlay (mipi-panel.dtbo) is now generated on the website. Use the online generator, download the file, then pick it here.
generator_warn_text: Use the original (.dtb) file from your console! Not a (.dtb) from dArkOS, ArkOSRE, ArkOS4Clones or any system other than your original card's!
overlay_will_skip: Skipped: default overlay will be used
overlay_skip_hint: Skip this step only if your hardware boots fine with the default overlay shipped in the image.
confirm_warning: ALL DATA ON THE SD CARD WILL BE ERASED!
done: SD card ready! Insert in R36S and power on.
sd_slow_warning: Slow SD card detected ({speed} MB/s). We recommend using a quality SD card (Class 10 / U1 or higher). Writing will be slower to prevent corruption.
error_no_space: Not enough disk space for decompression.
error_device_removed: Device not found. Was the SD card removed?
error_not_removable: Selected disk is not a removable device.
error_no_image: No image found in latest release.
error_network: Network error. Check your internet connection.
error_checksum_failed: Checksum verification failed. Re-download the image.
error_write_failed: Error writing image to SD card.
error_flash_failed: Flash failed. Check that the SD card is inserted and not write-protected.
error_verify_failed: Verification failed: SD card contents differ from written image. Try a different SD card.
error_write_protected: The card is write-protected. Check the lock switch on the SD adapter.
error_device_busy: The card is in use by another program. Close any window showing it (and run as administrator), then try again.
error_media: Media error while accessing the card. It may be failing — try another SD card.
error_open_device: Could not open the SD card device.
overlay_no_sd: Insert an Arch R SD card
overlay_not_archr: This SD card does not contain Arch R.
verify_hint: Reads the SD card back and compares its SHA-256 against the image. Adds 1-2 minutes but catches bad cards and corrupted writes.
